title: Sasha Orloff, Co-Founder & CEO of Puzzle on Accounting, Fundraising, and Team Building

source.description:
Can you make data-driven decisions about your company’s finances? 📊💡

In the latest episode of TALKS WITH DASHA, I sat down with Sasha Orloff, Co-Founder & CEO of Puzzle 🧩🚀 to uncover the groundbreaking solutions Puzzle brings to the table such as: 

- Tax Readiness
- Business Clarity
- User-Friendly Design

We also tackled key topics like building company values, hiring top talent, and fundraising tips.

theme.summary: This transcript is fundamentally focused on entrepreneurship, business strategy, and company building. The entire conversation covers Sasha's entrepreneurial journey building Puzzle, extensively discussing core business concepts including: startup founding and scaling, business model development (solving accounting/tax compliance for founders), customer acquisition and retention, fundraising strategies and investor relations, team building and hiring philosophy, company culture development, pricing strategies, go-to-market approaches, and practical business advice on everything from time management to equity allocation. While it touches on accounting software and AI features, these are explored through the lens of business strategy and building a successful company. The discussion covers practical business advice on fundraising preparation, team management, company culture, and scaling - all fundamental business topics that align perfectly with the existing business category which already contains extensive content on entrepreneurship, startup strategy, business models, venture capital, and company building frameworks from other successful founders.
